summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: State
Good
Recovery 60 • Sleep 64 • Strain 25%

Read
Fueling is still untouched, while movement and strain are light, so the afternoon starts with capacity but little intake behind it. Recovery is serviceable, not fully charged. This favors a protein-forward first meal and measured effort over intensity, protecting muscle without forcing a deep deficit.

Measured, not empty.

Performance: Measured, not empty.

Transit: none
